inputs.label: Counted Hairs
inputs.businessContext: Number of hairs observed in the sample area.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of hairs observed in the sample area.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der im Probenbereich beobachteten Haare.

inputs.label: Sample Area
inputs.businessContext: Area of the sample region in square centimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Area of the sample region in square centimeters.

inputs.label: Magnification
inputs.businessContext: Magnification factor of the optical device (1 for no magnification).

businessContext_i18n.en: Magnification factor of the optical device (1 for no magnification).
businessContext_i18n.de: Vergrößerungsfaktor des optischen Geräts (1 für keine Vergrößerung).

inputs.label: Calibration Factor
inputs.businessContext: Device-specific calibration coefficient to correct the measurement.

businessContext_i18n.en: Device-specific calibration coefficient to correct the measurement.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ölçümü düzeltmek için cihaza özgü kalibrasyon katsayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gerätespezifischer Kalibrierungskoeffizient zur Korrektur der Messung.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
